summary: Tested party products search, bundle deconstruction, celebrate pillar products, Mira mobile chat, and TTS voice configuration. All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: 22 TDC branded party products and 23 bundle-deconstructed items already in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Party products are searchable via /api/products?search=. TDC branded products have source='tdc_branded', bundle deconstructed have source='bundle_deconstruction'. TTS voice is Elise (EST9Ui6982FZPSi7gCHi). Mira mobile chat works on iPhone (375x812) and Android (360x800) viewports.

search_party_hat.details: Search for 'party hat' returns 16 products including Birthday Cone Hat, Pawty Hat Set

search_balloon.details: Search for 'balloon' returns 17 products including WOOF Letter Balloon Set, Paw Print Balloon Garland Kit

search_birthday_boy_bandana.details: Search for 'Birthday Boy Bandana' returns exact match - Birthday Boy Bandana - Blue & Gold at ₹299

celebrate_pillar_products.details: 301 celebrate pillar products, includes 22 TDC branded party products

bundle_deconstructed_searchable.details: TDC Birthday Cake and other bundle items searchable, 23 items in dine pillar

mira_mobile_iphone.details: Mira chat widget works on iPhone viewport (375x812), has mic button, input field, quick actions

mira_mobile_android.details: Mira chat widget works on Android viewport (360x800), all features functional

sample_tdc_branded_products: Pawty Hat Set - Rainbow Pack (3 Hats) (₹349)
Birthday Girl Bandana - Pink & Rose Gold (₹299)
WOOF Letter Balloon Set - Gold Foil (₹299)
Paw Print Balloon Garland Kit (50 Pcs) (₹549)
Ultimate Pawty Box - Complete Birthday Kit (₹1499)
notes: Bundle deconstructed items are in 'dine' pillar because they came from dine_bundles collection. celebrate_bundles had empty 'includes' arrays so no celebrate items were deconstructed. This is expected behavior based on the source data.
